codeReview.summary: Commit b5feef8 fully resolves the two prior blocking frontend scrutiny issues in plugin-registry. Node-scoped onConnectionValidate hooks now correctly match source/target node types, and registerPlugin now stages validation/registrations and commits atomically with rollback on failure to prevent partial stale state. Added regression tests cover both fixes. I also re-checked the previously failed frontend-core-decoupling blocking items (canvas memo import and node/properties-panel nullability typing) and they remain resolved in current code, with no regressions introduced by this fix.
